settings.heading: Spread the Good.
settings.subtext: Nut & seed spreads sweetened only with whole dates. Zero refined sugar. Zero preservatives. Just pure, lick-the-spoon deliciousness.

settings.heading: Oil on Top? That's Nature at Work.
settings.body: That layer of oil is just the natural separation of pure nut oils — a beautiful reminder that we never use artificial stabilizers. A quick stir is all it takes.

settings.heading: Only the Good Calories.
settings.body: Packed with feel-good fuel from real nuts, seeds, dates, and coconut oil. Rich in omega-3s, vitamins, and protein — no empty calories here.

settings.heading: Short Shelf Life? That's a Good Thing.
settings.body: Real food doesn't last forever, and neither do our spreads. No preservatives means every spoonful is as fresh and alive as nature intended.

settings.name: Patricia Raphael
settings.quote: I just tried the spread this morning. It was really nice — not sweet at all! I had both the pistachio and choco hazelnut mixed in a sandwich and it was amazing.

settings.name: Aabgina
settings.quote: We met at the Ripe market. Messaging you to tell you that my kids loved loved loved the chocolate hazelnut spread Thank god I have tried so may things to get them OFF NUTELLA. At last I heard her say this is better than Nutella.. Alhamdallah.

settings.name: Kylie-Anne Pacheco
settings.quote: Thank you so much! I absolutely love your spreads, really they are so good. I think I'd like to try the no-tella chocolate one next. I regret not buying it.

settings.name: Anna
settings.quote: Hey!! They're soooo delicious thank you! I'm particularly obsessed with the pistachio one! I will definitely be a regular customer!

settings.name: Natalie
settings.quote: I should have bought 3 of your almond cinnamon spread. The girls are already halfway through the jar! They LOVE it. You're onto a winner there.

settings.name: Lauren
settings.quote: Absolutely in love with the almond cinnamon spread.
